offers.name: Home Service AI Follow-Up Starter
offers.price_or_pricing_notes: $300/month positioning in outreach copy; one recovered job should cover it.
offers.target_customer: Owner-operated or local home-service businesses that miss quote/estimate follow-up.

prospects.owner_operator_reason: Smaller local active-website prospect; avoids obvious franchise/multi-location targets from first Vapi batch.
Replacement smaller local active-website prospect with local phone area code.

assets.why_it_matters: Public conversion asset for the offer.

assets.name: First Vapi cold-call campaign report
assets.why_it_matters: Shows IVR/DTMF failure and big-company calling lessons.

assets.why_it_matters: Evidence that owner-operated prospects are a better next call target.

next_actions.action: Retry a local prospect during business hours
next_actions.reason: After-hours call hit a closed-office flow; the assistant said it would try again during business hours.
next_actions.expected_revenue_path: Better contact → reply or booked call → home-service follow-up starter sale

next_actions.action: Send a short email fallback after voicemail
next_actions.reason: Voicemail was reached; the report says the AI offered to have Matthew send one short email.
next_actions.expected_revenue_path: Better contact → reply or booked call → home-service follow-up starter sale

next_actions.action: Verify public CRM redaction before any GitHub Pages publishing
next_actions.reason: The CRM contains prospect data and call evidence; public output must prove that sensitive fields are removed.
next_actions.expected_revenue_path: Protect trust and keep public status useful without leaking prospect/campaign details

next_actions.action: Call a local owner-operated prospect in the business-hours batch

next_actions.expected_revenue_path: Better contact → reply or booked call → home-service follow-up starter sale

evidence.summary: Owner-operated after-hours test: 3 calls, $0.4506, business-hours retry recommended.
First Vapi campaign: 7 calls, about $1.06, IVR/DTMF is the blocker.
Prepared script for the seven remaining owner-operated prospects.
Offer source for target customer and positioning.

privacy.note: Derived from private data after schema validation; sensitive contact, prospect identity, and call-detail fields are omitted.
